title: Too Cool For Evangelion School
wikitext:
[]: Too Cool For (Evangelion @) School             Quote Post by Ayana-Me » Sat Apr 28, 2007 12:37 pm Ok so now GAINAX has an official site for Eva @ School . Does anyone know if this is television series or just a new line of action figures? Is anyone else reminded of the Muppet Babies? From free translator: "It is docile cool". Sweet.

[]:             Quote Post by Kaysow » Sat Apr 28, 2007 12:42 pm It's like Baby Loony Tunes; unnecessary

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Sat Apr 28, 2007 12:45 pm MEIN EYES. Well, I have to admit that Chibi-Rei's teddy-Sachiel is kind of cute.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Apr 28, 2007 2:16 pm I still don't see anything implying that it will take animated form.

[]:             Quote Post by Tokpile Quohog » Sat Apr 28, 2007 2:19 pm Christ, there's something that's telling me to buy the figures. :cry:

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sat Apr 28, 2007 3:07 pm Oh Gainax, you never cease to amaze. I don't really know what to say. Looks harmless if it is anime (so Asuka is after Shinji it seems...must pay off to be a whiner in Japan huh? According to anime they get all the girls). 3 Rei's huh? One of them being ultra-hyper. I wonder which one has the pumpkin panties....knowing how perverted Japan is its probably the youngest one. Thus Gainax has assured immediate success with three Rei's, each younger and more docile than the next. Who the hell is that character above Misato? Are the angels going to be cute practically naked girls like that Gainax figure line? And Kaworu....oh god Kaworu, I'm afraid to see how obnoxious he'll look up close. Also, is it me or is the Eva a bit dressed up? More than usual. Though on the pure comic side Chibi-Gendo is hardcore. P.S. I know it's just a figure but I'm very taken with the white and black Evangelion Unit 01 figure. It's on the news page of the website with the words SPEC in the title. P.S.S. Can anyone read or translate Japanese to even find out if this is an anime or just a toyline. So far I'm thinking toyline but you never know. http://www.evangelion.co.jp/petit_eva/goods.html

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sat Apr 28, 2007 3:21 pm Gendo'sPapa wrote: Who the hell is that character above Misato?

[]:             Quote Post by Dmth_mUTE_dEATH » Sat Apr 28, 2007 5:27 pm Is that white thing in the back a SEELE obelisk? This weird capitalism-driven BS is kind of cool, really because it's just so random.

[]:             Quote Post by gydromon » Sat Apr 28, 2007 5:48 pm Gendo'sPapa wrote: Who the hell is that character above Misato? Are the angels going to be cute practically naked girls like that Gainax figure line? words SPEC in the title. http://www.evangelion.co.jp/petit_eva/goods.html

[]:             Quote Post by Ayana-Me » Sat Apr 28, 2007 5:50 pm Dmth_mUTE_dEATH wrote: Is that white thing in the back a SEELE obelisk

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Apr 28, 2007 8:02 pm My prediction once again: Eva @ School, if it IS animated, will be some cutesy lil thing shown before each Webuild part. Until I hear otherwise, I'm thinking of this as an excuse to make Eva look all "kawaii! <3 raabu raabu ." And Asuka, after Shinji? What else is new.

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Sat Apr 28, 2007 9:29 pm I read some stuff from an Puchi Eva article on a Japanese magazine and it only mentioned figures and manga.

[]:             Quote Post by Tokpile Quohog » Sat Apr 28, 2007 9:57 pm oh yea, eva01 looks like she's wearing a blue gi.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Apr 28, 2007 11:19 pm AchtungAffen wrote: I read some stuff from an Puchi Eva article on a Japanese magazine and it only mentioned figures and manga.

[]: school days             Quote Post by gydromon » Sun Apr 29, 2007 12:19 am a manga would be cool- toys are always awesome- i like little Rei's toys-

[]: Re: school days             Quote Post by Tokpile Quohog » Sun Apr 29, 2007 12:20 am gydromon wrote: a manga would be cool- toys are always awesome- i like little Rei's toys-

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Sun Apr 29, 2007 8:23 pm Reichu wrote: AchtungAffen wrote: I read some stuff from an Puchi Eva article on a Japanese magazine and it only mentioned figures and manga.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Apr 30, 2007 1:04 am AchtungAffen wrote: Someone sent me the image but didn't say where he got it.

[]:             Quote Post by Zkh » Mon Apr 30, 2007 9:04 am If it IS animated then if it's anything like SD Gundam, like a parody of itself..A GOOD PARODY, then it will be win, especially for fans of the show. If it's some kinda baby loony tunes(not likely) kiddie show then I will use the DVD's to lure children.

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Mon Apr 30, 2007 3:47 pm Reichu wrote: AchtungAffen wrote: Someone sent me the image but didn't say where he got it.
summary:
[]: Too Cool For (Evangelion @) School             Quote Post by Ayana-Me » Sat Apr 28, 2007 12:37 pm Ok so now GAINAX has an official site for Eva @ School . Does anyone know if this is television series or just a new line of action figures? Is anyone else reminded of the Muppet Babies? From free translator: "It is docile cool". Sweet.
